results.intent: Reset the password for user 48213 to a temporary value since they got locked out after forgetting their login credentials
As part of our quarterly security policy, update employee jsmith's account password to comply with the new complexity requirements
results.raw_response:
{"selected_method": "PUT", "selected_path": "/users/{userId}/password", "parameters": {"userId": "smith"}}

Reasoning: The selected method is "PUT" as it allows updating an existing user's password. The selected path is "/users/{userId}/password" which corresponds to the userId parameter in the request. The parameters are provided as {userId: "smith"}, where "smith" should be replaced with the actual username or email address of the user whose password needs to be updated. This ensures that only the specified user's password is being modified according to the given requirement.

results.intent: Update the name and description of the #project-atlas channel for my user account to reflect the new product launch phase
As an admin, mute notification settings and rename the support-escalations channel under my profile to archive-support-escalations
Our team lead Sarah is going on extended maternity leave starting next week, so please transfer ownership of account 88213 to her backup, mike.chen@acmecorp.com
We're restructuring the west region sales division and need to reassign account 44210's owner to the new regional director, jennifer.oyelaran@company.com
Pull up the issue history for our 3rd floor Zoom Room from March 1st to March 15th so I can see what's been going wrong with the connection lately.
I need a report on all reported problems for the executive boardroom Zoom Room between last Monday and today, can you fetch up to 50 records at a time?
We accidentally recorded a confidential client negotiation on meeting 88213 — please permanently delete recording rec_4471 from it right away.
Compliance flagged that the training session recording (ID rec_9032) under meeting 55210 contains PII that shouldn't be retained. Can you trash that recording instead of just archiving it?
We accidentally created a duplicate poll for tomorrow's all-hands meeting, can you remove poll ID 8842 from meeting 3391 so attendees aren't confused?
The product feedback poll we set up for the Q3 roadmap review is no longer needed since we're covering it live now, please delete poll 5567 from meeting 1204.
We just finished migrating everyone out of the 'Contractors-2019' access group into the new system, so go ahead and delete that old group now.
Can you remove the 'Marketing-Interns-Summer' group from our directory? The internship program ended and we don't need that group cluttering up the permissions list anymore.
Pull up the first page of my external contacts so I can see which vendor reps I've chatted with before scheduling the renewal call
I need a list of all my internal coworker contacts in chat, limited to 50 per page, to cross-check who's already on our project channel

Can you pull up the connection details and current status for our production Postgres cluster with ID a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890? I need to check its configuration before we onboard a new microservice.

Our on-call engineer flagged a potential issue with database cluster 98765432-10ab-cdef-1234-567890abcdef—can you fetch its current status and specs so we can confirm whether it's actually running low on resources?
Can you pull the daily bandwidth usage for our three production apps—checkout, inventory, and customer-portal—so I can check if we're approaching our CDN plan's threshold this month?
I need to compare bandwidth consumption across all our regional apps for March 15th to figure out which one caused the spike in our hosting bill.
We had a database failover in our production cluster—please reassign floating IP 203.0.113.42 to the standby droplet so traffic reroutes without changing DNS records.
Our droplet tied to floating IP 198.51.100.7 is being decommissioned tonight; unassign the IP from it first so we can attach it to the replacement server tomorrow.
Set up a new firewall for our production Kubernetes cluster that only allows inbound traffic on ports 80 and 443 from the load balancer subnet.
We're onboarding a new client environment and need a firewall created that restricts SSH access to just our office IP range and opens port 5432 for the database team's VPN.

parameters.description: Restricts SSH access to our office IP range and opens port 5432 for the database team's VPN.
